Scalings.Name: Shotgun Wedding
Scalings.Note: 5x in 2.5s, 25% more dmg per hit (up to 100%), MAGIC

Scalings.Name: Finish the Movement
Scalings.Note: every 2nd focus, hit if full res

Scalings.Name: See Red
Scalings.Note: 20x over 4s, AD, MAGIC, BUG! AD does not work

Scalings.Name: Gore Afflict
Scalings.Note: 2 ticks per sec, refresh on non-glance

Scalings.Name: There Will Be Blood DOT
Scalings.Note: scales with enemies hit, maximum 6 enemies

Scalings.Name: Gnosis
Scalings.Note: 33% on weakened (MULTHIT TEST -> seems to be per hit but at most once per sec)

Scalings.Name: From the Abyss
Scalings.Note: every 3 hits (MULTIHIT TEST -> once per ability)

Scalings.Name: Ripple Effect
Scalings.Note: next attack after 2 burst hits (can be consumed and gained in the same attack)

Scalings.Name: Cutting Thoughts
Scalings.Note: counter per hit, 5 counter -> next hit does 3x cutting thoughs, gain once per sec

Scalings.Name: Power Line
Scalings.Note: 10x over 10s, RANGED, no procs, vuln immediately, affected by additive

Scalings.Name: Whiteout
Scalings.Note: 16x over 8s, 1s, does not proc, affected by additive

Scalings.Name: Fire it up without Smells like Victory
Passive
